properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God is not a man that he should lie Nor Son of man that he should repent As He said and will be not conforming As He spoken and will not make it through

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I Am the Lord, I do not change My work thus not return unto Me boil Yesterday today forever It's still the same No My Word cannot be destroy

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In the beginning was the Word The Word was with God and the Word was God His words forever settles and always stand For He elshadai Shalom the Great I Am.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Word made flesh and dwelled among all men We beheld His Glory full of grace and Through And now today It's cross then us the hope of Glory The mystery reveald to me and you
